title: OTL Vacuum Storage Space Saver Bag 60x80cm Fresh Linen
features: Ultimate protection for bedding, sweaters, seasonal clothes and travel
When storing away as the airtight/watertight seal will prevent mould, moisture, musty odours, moths, dirt or dust.
Very easy to use, just any household vacuum with a hose to remove the air and Shrink storage up to 75%
It is reusable Ideal for travel with no vinyl bag odour.
The bag can be easily stored anywhere e.g. attic, basement, under bed, in suitcase etc.
description: Ideal for storage of textiles, covers and cushions in this space saving vacuum storage bag. Twin zip-lock seals. Mould, moisture and insect proof. Can compress items down to 1/3 original size. Fresh linen fragrance.
